title: andropogon nitidus
intro: Andropogon nitidus, also known as Black Grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Andropogon nitidus include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antidiabetic and antihypertensive effects. Andropogon nitidus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
